candidate.name: Hunter Brown
candidate.work_authorization: Authorized to work in the United States. No sponsorship required.

professional_summary_options.it_support: Technology professional with a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology & Systems, CCNA-equivalent networking coursework, Security+ in progress, and a strong customer service background. Skilled in troubleshooting, documentation, technical communication, and supporting users across technical and business environments.
professional_summary_options.digital_operations: Digital operations and technology professional with experience in Google Ads, Google Analytics, SEO, website management, client consulting, and business operations. Combines technical aptitude, marketing systems knowledge, and strong communication skills to improve digital workflows and performance.
professional_summary_options.business_analyst: Information Technology & Systems graduate with experience in business operations, client communication, documentation, workflow improvement, and AI-enabled process design. Strong ability to translate business needs into clear technical and operational requirements.

projects.name: RecruitingOS
projects.description: Designing and building an AI recruiting operating system using Python, OpenAI Agents SDK, structured candidate memory, Excel-based job tracking, resume tailoring, cover letter generation, recruiter outreach, and workflow automation.
resume_bullets: Built an AI-powered recruiting workflow that reads job tracker data, evaluates job fit, generates application materials, and writes structured results back to Excel.
Designed structured candidate memory using JSON and Markdown to support truthful resume tailoring, ATS optimization, and recruiter outreach.
Implemented a Python-based agent workflow using the OpenAI Agents SDK, openpyxl, and document generation tools.

projects.name: Business Analyst AI Chatbot Capstone

resume_bullets: Gathered and documented requirements for an AI chatbot solution as part of a business analysis capstone project.
Created documentation, workflow analysis, and solution recommendations focused on user needs and process improvement.
